backend/main.mo: Defines the main canister with data models, per-user storage maps, and helper functions for retrieving or initializing user-specific data.
backend/migration.mo: Implements a migration that converts projects with non-optional dates into versions with optional start and end dates.
feature_evidence.json: Contains feature evidence metadata mapping features to impacted files, components, and test requirements.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Lists pre-written textual summaries for various frontend files for documentation or tooling usage.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Initializes PDF.js globally, sets up authentication and user profile gating, and manages top-level page routing via internal state.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Provides the main app layout with responsive sidebar, header controls, account menu, and navigation handling.
frontend/src/components/BaseDialog.tsx: Reusable dialog wrapper enforcing consistent structure, styling, and behavior across modal components.
frontend/src/components/CalendarView.tsx: Renders a month/week calendar view, computes date ranges, and displays projects occurring on each day.
frontend/src/components/CalendarWidget.t: Displays a monthly calendar with project start/end and task-due events and supports navigating to related pages.
frontend/src/components/CostItemsSection: Manages adding, listing, and removing project cost items, including category and status selection and total cost calculation.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: Shows a confirmation dialog for deletions with optional item name and pending state handling.
frontend/src/components/DynamicSelect.ts: Provides a select input that allows adding new options via a dialog with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: Catches React rendering errors and displays a fallback UI with error details and a reload option.
frontend/src/components/PDFThumbnail.tsx: Generates and caches PDF thumbnails using PDF.js with retry logic, error handling, and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/components/PDFViewer.tsx: Empty or missing file content; no functionality shown.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal form allowing users to enter name, optional email, and user type, then saving the profile via mutation.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedPDFViewer: PDF viewer component with caching, page rendering, zooming, navigation, and optional download control.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidates dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hooks for handling Internet Identity authentication, login flow, and stored identities.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, projects, and other backend data with actor retry logic.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind base styles and theme variables defining light and dark mode color tokens and layout defaults.
frontend/src/lib/customCategories.ts: Utility functions for storing, retrieving, and extending custom local-storage-backed category lists with defaults.
frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.ts: Provides date utilities for checking week ranges, formatting bigint timestamps, and converting between Date and bigint nanosecond timestamps.
frontend/src/lib/focusManager.ts: Implements React hooks to auto-focus elements when dialogs open and optionally restore previous focus on close.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point setting up React Query and Internet Identity providers before rendering the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Contacts.tsx: Contacts page handling CRUD for contacts and helpful links with filtering, dialogs, and search functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard showing projects and tasks, supports creating items, dynamic filtering, and weekly task detection using date utilities.
frontend/src/pages/Documents.tsx: Documents page enabling PDF upload, viewing, categorization, and deletion with folder expansion and upload queue handling.
frontend/src/pages/Kostenuebersicht.tsx: Costs overview page for listing, filtering, sorting, editing, and creating cost items with document linking and identity-aware behavior.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the login page UI and triggers Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/Media.tsx: Provides a media manager with upload, view, edit, delete, drag-and-drop sorting, and category handling for images and PDFs.
frontend/src/pages/Roadmap.tsx: Displays and manages projects with creation, editing, deletion, categories, calendar view, and cost items.
frontend/src/pages/Tasks.tsx: Implements a task board with filtering, creation, editing, status changes, and custom category support.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Contains the project’s metadata, architectural notes, and known issues, detailing the frontend–backend structure, data flows, and technology stack. Serves as a high-level technical overview of the app’s components, behaviors, and current gaps.
